title: Replay Mode Safety Rules
description: Safety rules and constraints for Replay Mode operations

preReplayChecks.description: Verify all required input files for the stage exist
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Cannot replay: required input files are missing

preReplayChecks.description: Verify the selected stage exists in stage-contracts
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Cannot replay: stage does not exist

preReplayChecks.description: Verify stage contract defines the stage
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Cannot replay: stage contract not found

preReplayChecks.description: Verify model routing exists for the stage
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Cannot replay: model route not defined

preReplayChecks.description: Verify all required gates have passed
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Warning: some required gates may not have passed

preReplayChecks.description: Check if S7 approval will become stale
preReplayChecks.errorMessage: Warning: S7 human approval will become stale if S5/S6 are replayed

replayOperations.description: Create snapshot of all inputs before replay
Execute the stage with appropriate model

humanApprovalRules.condition: replay stage is S5 or S6
humanApprovalRules.reason: Upstream angle generation was replayed. Human selection must be reviewed again.

humanApprovalRules.effect: Workflow must pause for new approval
humanApprovalRules.reason: S7 was replayed. New human approval required.

humanApprovalRules.condition: replay stage is S8-S12 without angle change
humanApprovalRules.reason: Selected angle unchanged, approval still valid

humanApprovalRules.condition: replay stage is S8-S12 with angle change
humanApprovalRules.reason: Selected angle changed. Human approval must be redone.

claimLedgerRules.condition: replay stage is S2, S3, or S4A
claimLedgerRules.action: mark S10, S11, S12, S13 as needs_revision
mark S11, S12, S13 as stale

restoreRules.description: Restore must always have rerunReason or restoreReason
Restoring an output marks downstream outputs as stale
Restore events are logged in replay-history.json
Restored outputs should go through validation

promptTestRules.description: Load the exact prompt version specified in the request
Do not replace production prompt automatically
Human must accept to promote prompt version
Compare output against previous prompt version

modelTestRules.description: Verify model is allowed for the stage's model role
Do not change default routing automatically

dryRunRules.description: Dry-run must not call real models
Dry-run must not overwrite any outputs
Simulate all pre-replay checks and report results

prohibitedActions.description: Replay must never bypass S7 human approval
Replay must never bypass S13 validation
Replay must never create fake progress
Replay must never mark campaign as ready_to_send
Replay must never silently overwrite without archiving
Replay must never delete archived outputs
